description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, sprawling layout with a combination of rectangular and semi-octagonal sections, giving it a distinctive footprint. The exterior walls are clad in light tan brick, and the structure is punctuated by numerous white-framed windows, including a prominent bay window section. The property includes a fenced backyard with mature trees, a patio area with outdoor furniture, and a small pool, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The roof is flat, with some sections possibly accommodating HVAC units or skylights. The interior is visible through the open plan, showing multiple rooms, including a kitchen, living area, and bedrooms. The front approach is defined by a curved walkway and landscaped garden, enhancing curb appeal.
description: A single-story tan brick bungalow with a flat roof, bay window, fenced backyard, patio, and pool, featuring numerous white-framed windows and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bungalow are visible, highlighting the bay window, curved walkway, and landscaped entry with patio furniture.
description_view_1: The rear and side of the bungalow are shown, emphasizing the fenced backyard, mature trees, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_2: The backyard and pool area are prominent, with the flat roof and rear rooms of the bungalow visible.
description_view_3: The long side of the bungalow is visible, showing the main entrance, multiple windows, and the connection between the bay window section and the rest of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with bay window and grouped side windows
